title: althenia patentifolia
intro: Althenia patentifolia, also known as the "althernanthe", is a type of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Althenia patentifolia include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of Althenia patentifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
